calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners RIZWAN M SUBEDAR and AMRINBANU I. PATEL parents of minor present in court.
PetitionerS sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from AAFREEN A. PATEL to AAFREEN RIZWAN SUBEDAR.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Reset To Oct-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
